title: Title the payroll-market slide
guidance: Reward a title that states the takeaway as a claim and reads like an MBB action title. Penalise topic labels or anything unsupported by the body.

runner_input.instruction: Write the slide title as the takeaway of the body below.
runner_input.constraints: Output: a single title line only. No body, no bullets, no colon-subtitle.

items: 1.4m businesses with 5–249 employees; ~60% (840k) on dedicated payroll software
Dedicated SAM ~£1.1bn (840k × £1.3k ACV); greenfield (manual switchers) ~£730m; total SAM ~£1.8bn
Growing ~11% YoY (auto-enrolment complexity, IR35 enforcement, RTI upgrades)
Incumbents: 2 legacy players 55% share, no major update in 3+ yrs, NPS ~18
Tailwind: open banking + HMRC API modernisation (2025) lower the build cost for challengers

rubric_notes: Should pair scale with the regulatory-tailwind wedge.
